summary: Cycle G (7th overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-23, ~56min after cycle F — back in line with A→E ~57min cadence) ran heartbeat-only. Both queues absent on disk for 28th consecutive cycle. regen-all clean: ALL CHECKS PASSED, round-trip 0 failures sustained (24s elapsed at 10:02:02Z; heartbeat at 10:02:21Z status=PASS). Two substantive findings beyond pure heartbeat: (1) Cadence reverted to ~56min F→G, refuting cycle F's 'throttled cron' hypothesis (3a) and supporting 'natural variability' interpretation (3b) — the E→F ~5h gap was a single outlier event, not a cadence change. Recorded as evidence updating carry-over #1, NOT as new item. (2) GATE-FAIL semantics inability-to-corroborate — cycle F documented post-commit-hook GATE-FAIL after f5a3168b at 09:10Z as second of two observations supporting interpretation #1 (benign gate-skip). Cycle G read regen-all-last-pass.json at cycle G open and found status=PASS (cycle F's 09:02:47Z write), NOT GATE-FAIL. Three possible reconciliations enumerated in cycle G journal Step 0a; cycle G honestly records inability to re-verify rather than rubber-stamping. Carry-over #7 preserved with cycle G's recommendation: distinguish 'post-commit hook fires' vs 'post-commit hook runs regen-all + writes heartbeat' on investigation. Founder F→G window quiet (0 substantive + 1 routine cron 90346c33), consistent with sleep continuation. Three pre-existing untracked Founder files unchanged from cycle F close. Single yellow user-context-gate continues (main-flows.html ~8.33d stale, was 8.29d at F — natural drift). Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST — empty-inbox honestly recorded; cadence-revert is positive evidence; GATE-FAIL inability-to-corroborate explicitly stated. Seven carry-over Founder action items preserved unchanged from cycle F close (no new items, no drops; cycle G updates evidence on items #1 and #7 without changing count).
founder_action_items: Cron cadence - now 12th consecutive flag. Cycle G's F→G gap (~56min) refutes cycle F's 'throttled cron' hypothesis (3a) and supports 'natural variability' (3b) — the E→F ~5h gap was a single outlier event. Original Founder-action remains: edit overnight-triage cron prompt to add Step-0 guard that exits clean if `git log --since='3h'` shows no inbox motion AND last regen-all heartbeat is < 60 min old. Founder may also consider that 28 consecutive empty-inbox cycles is itself a signal worth a Step-0 guard regardless of cadence variability.
A8_performance: Lighthouse 65/100 on 1 page (target 75+) - open .lighthouseci/*.html, fix top failures (carry-over from cycles S→F; dimension score holds due to rolling-window mechanics).

main-flows.html user-context capture ~8.33 days stale at cycle G (was 8.29 at cycle F — natural drift over ~56min) - run `node scripts/visual-audit/founder-context-capture.mjs` before next ship-close (not blocking; same diagnosis as cycles S→F).
quota-status weekly_cap field still null - no % computation possible (preserved Founder-triage item from cycles R→F; sidecar discipline OK per [quota-status-schema] check).

aggregate-fiq-status D40 parity GATE-FAIL - stale-timestamp >24h hard threshold tripped because FIQ has had zero churn across 28 consecutive empty-inbox cycles (~28h+ elapsed). NOT an aggregator bug. Will trip on every cycle until FIQ activity resumes or remedy lands (4 remedies enumerated in cycle B post-commit observation).

A12_operational - sustained yellow as of cycle F (continued oscillation across rolling-window mechanics). Cycle G ran clean; current dimension score visible in cycle G's regenerated docs/reports/app-health.html.

Heartbeat `status: GATE-FAIL` field semantics - PRESERVED from cycle F with cycle G note: cycle G could not corroborate cycle F's 09:10Z GATE-FAIL observation (heartbeat at cycle G open showed PASS, not GATE-FAIL). Three reconciliations possible: (a) cycle F's GATE-FAIL was overwritten by an intervening process, (b) cycle F's observation was transient/incomplete, (c) the 90346c33 post-commit hook ('AMD-019/020 auto-clean') runs a different code path than regen-all and doesn't touch the heartbeat. Recommended for cycle H or Founder investigation: distinguish 'post-commit hook fires' vs 'post-commit hook runs regen-all + writes heartbeat'. The 90346c33 commit message says 'AMD-019/020 auto-clean' which is a different code path than dashboard regen — supporting reconciliation (c).
